name: nullclaw-defi-agent
description: Autonomous DeFi Agent powered by NullClaw + Tether WDK -- Multi-chain (EVM + Solana) with LLM-driven decision engine

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd sidecar && npm install && cd ../ui && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp -n env.example .env || true
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start:ui
